steps: Create mixture of CsCl, Proteinase K, and SDS. CsCl purified phage lysate, Proteinase K, SDS by Verve Team
Add an equal volume of phenol and invert several times.
Spin 3000g (6000 rpm on microfuge), 5 minutes, room temperature. 00:05:00
Carefully transfer the supernatant with a wide-bore pipette to a fresh tube.
Add an equal volume of phenol:choroform (1:1), invert.
Spin again, 3000g (6000 rpm on microfuge), 5 minutes, room temperature. 00:05:00
Transfer the supernatant, as done before.
Add an equal volume of chloroform and invert.
Spin again, 3000g (6000 rpm on microfuge), 5 minutes, room temperature. 00:05:00
Transfer the supernatant, as done before. 00:05:00
creator: Verve Team
